failClosedRules: live recovery controls require a current BackupSetManifest per essential-function dataset scope
restore report delivery requires a governed ArtifactPresentationContract grant and never a raw object-store URL
missing secret refs, unsupported scopes, stale checksums, missing immutability proof, and tuple drift block or downgrade controls
report delivery failure retains the resilience-board summary and queues the safe fallback disposition
